scene_1.dialogue: Narrator: 'In moments of loss, Cuddle Clones brings timeless comfort.'
scene_1.music: Melancholic piano melody evoking deep emotions.
scene_1.sfx: Soft weeping in the background, gentle petting sounds.

text-to-image.Core Subject & Action: Pet owner holds plush replica of golden retriever
text-to-image.Environment & Context: Cozy living room setting with soft lighting
text-to-image.Technical Specs & Camera: Close-up shot with shallow depth of field

scene_1.visual: Soft lighting in a cozy living room, a tearful pet owner holds a lifelike plush replica of their late golden retriever, caressing its fur gently.

scene_2.dialogue: Narrator: 'Cuddle Clones, where memories become forever companions.'
scene_2.music: Epic orchestra swells with a sense of unity and love.
scene_2.sfx: Gentle breeze rustling through the field, soft animal laughter.

text-to-image.Core Subject & Action: Multiple pet plush replicas playing in a field
text-to-image.Style & Lighting: Golden hour lighting enhancing warmth and surrealism
text-to-image.Technical Specs & Camera: Wide-angle shot capturing the beauty of nature

scene_2.visual: Transitioning to a vast, dreamy field at sunset, multiple pet plush replicas frolic joyfully together, each one mirroring a real pet uniquely.

scene_3.dialogue: Narrator: 'Cuddle Clones, the unforgettable magic your pet deserves.'
scene_3.music: Upbeat symphonic score building excitement and wonder.
scene_3.sfx: Audience gasps and whispers in astonishment, stage lights flickering on.

text-to-image.Core Subject & Action: Colossal plush cat replica unveiled on grand stage
text-to-image.Technical Specs & Camera: Dynamic camera angles for grand reveal

scene_3.visual: A grand stage with a colossal plush replica of a house cat unveiled dramatically under dazzling spotlights, pet owners gasping in awe.
